title: Modeling CAR-T cell therapy on-chip
summary: Researchers demonstrate a microfluidic tumor-on-a-chip platform for modeling CAR-T cell therapy interactions with vascularized tumors. This approach enables high-throughput screening of CAR-T efficacy and pharmacology in a physiologically relevant 3D environment that recapitulates the tumor microenvironment.

title: Prime editing for precise genome engineering and modulation of fungal metabolism
summary: fPE7max, a next-generation prime editor, is shown to efficiently install base substitutions, insertions, and deletions for modulating filamentous fungal metabolism. This advance enables precise genetic modifications in industrial fungi with implications for biomanufacturing, enzyme engineering, and pharmaceutical compound production.

title: Biotech’s coming of age
summary: An editorial analysis of the biotech sector's recovery, highlighting how continued investor caution, China’s rising influence as a biotech power, and rapid AI integration are reshaping industry dynamics. The piece frames current market conditions as a period of structural transformation with significant implications for deal flow, M&A activity, and competitive strategy.
